intentional_holds.reason: ProductVersion stays 0.4.0 during v0.5.x fake import wizard and release-readiness phases until a planned product milestone explicitly approves a bump.
ProductVersion stays 0.4.0 for v0.6.x real-doc planning and safety-closeout phases; a future implementation prompt must separately approve any product milestone bump.
v0.8.x backlog, synthetic governance, and checkpoint phases are planning/docs/tooling phases only; productVersion remains 0.7.0 until a separate product-version bump is explicitly approved.

v0.9.x release-state, proof durability, and fake runtime UX checkpoint phases are not productVersion bump phases; productVersion remains 0.7.0 until a separate product-version bump is explicitly approved.
